result.stdout:
Description:
  Ant Design Blazor Component CLI

Usage:
  AntDesign.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list       List all available components
  demo       Search for component demos by component name and scenario
  search     Search for multiple components by names
  category   Get component information by category
  demo-list  List all available demos with their component, scenario, and description

commands.payload:
Description:
  Ant Design Blazor Component CLI

Usage:
  AntDesign.Cli [command] [options]

Options:
  --version       Show version information
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  list       List all available components
  demo       Search for component demos by component name and scenario
  search     Search for multiple components by names
  category   Get component information by category
  demo-list  List all available demos with their component, scenario, and description

result.stdout:
Description:
  Get component information by category

Usage:
  AntDesign.Cli category [options]

Options:
  -c, --category <category> (REQUIRED)  The category to filter components by, e.g. Components, Feedback, Navigation
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Description:

Usage:

Options:
  -c, --category <category> (REQUIRED)  The category to filter components by, e.g. Components, Feedback, Navigation
  -?, -h, --help                        Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search for component demos by component name and scenario

Usage:
  AntDesign.Cli demo [options]

Options:
  -q, --query <query> (REQUIRED)  Comma-separated list of 'Component:Scenario' pairs, e.g. Button:download,Table:pagination
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Description:
  Search for multiple components by names

Usage:
  AntDesign.Cli search [options]

Options:
  -n, --names <names> (REQUIRED)  Comma-separated list of component names to search for, e.g. Button,Table
  -?, -h, --help                  Show help and usage information
